# awscc_resiliencehubv2_user_journey (Resource)

Creates a user journey within a Resilience Hub system.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the user journey.
- `system_identifier` (String) The system ARN or system ID that owns this user journey.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the user journey.
- `policy_arn` (String) The ARN of the resilience policy to associate with this user journey.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the user journey was created.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the user journey was last updated.
- `user_journey_id` (String) The server-generated user journey ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_user_journey.example
  identity = {
    system_identifier = "system_identifier"
    user_journey_id   = "user_journey_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `system_identifier` (String) The system ARN or system ID that owns this user journey
- `user_journey_id` (String) The server-generated user journey ID

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_user_journey.example
  id = "system_identifier|user_journey_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_resiliencehubv2_user_journey.example "system_identifier|user_journey_id"
```
